use_cases: Primary application navigation in macOS-style interfaces
Quick-launch panel for frequently accessed features or pages
Icon-based navigation bar for dashboards and admin panels
Product category shortcuts in e-commerce platforms
ai_summary: A macOS-style dock navigation component featuring expanding icons on hover using CSS sibling selectors. The dock creates a cascading magnification effect where hovered icons and their adjacent icons scale up proportionally, while distant icons remain smaller. Commonly used as a primary navigation element or quick-access launcher in SaaS applications and modern web interfaces.
